    1. The Amazing Periodic Table

    The Amazing Periodic Table

    Here is the amazing periodic table for reference if needed. It contains Atomic numbers, Mass numbers, Electron shells and Electronic configurations. Credits: The image is sourced from a non-copyright free-for-use website called sciencenotes.org.
